title: About – Rt Hon Sir John Whittingdale OBE MP
headings: h2: Rt Hon Sir John Whittingdale OBE MP
h2: Member of Parliament for Maldon
h3: The role of an MP
text_excerpt: About – Rt Hon Sir John Whittingdale OBE MP Skip to content Rt Hon Sir John Whittingdale OBE MP Member of Parliament for Maldon Home Contact John Local News Westminster News Speeches Campaigns About Home Contact John Local News Westminster News Speeches Campaigns About About Sir John Whittingdale serves as the Member of Parliament for Maldon, representing residents in Westminster and working on their behalf across a wide range of national and local issues. His role is to represent constituents, scrutinise legislation, contribute to national policy, and ensure that the interests of Maldon and its communities are heard in Parliament and Government. This section provides further information about Sir John’s background, the constituency he represents, and the role of a Member of Parliament. About Sir John Sir John Whittingdale’s parliamentary career, ministerial service and experience in public life. Read more About Maldon Information on the towns, villages and communities represented, and the character and heritage of the constituency. Read more The role of an MP An overview of what Members of Parliament do, how they support constituents, and the responsibilities of parliamentary representation. Read more Supporting constituents A central part of Sir John’s work is assisting residents with issues affecting their daily lives — from navigating government services and raising concerns with public bodies, to representing local matters at national level. Members of Parliament act on behalf of all constituents, regardless of how they voted. Get in touch If you are a constituent and require assistance, or would like to raise an issue, please contact Sir John’s office . Published by Sir John Whittingdale OBE MP — Member of Parliament for Maldon 19 High Street, Maldon, Essex, CM9 5PE Westminster office: 020 7219 3557 john.whittingdale.mp@parliament.uk © John Whittingdale MP 2026 Privacy · Cookies · Accessibility We use cookies on our website to give you the most relevant experience by remembering your preferences and repeat visits.
